name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-8
title: rabbit-feature spec missing dispatcher spec-commit obligation
description: The Wave 3 tdd-subagent audit (2026-05-23) removed an invariant from tdd-subagent's spec that codified a rabbit-feature-touch obligation: 'After rabbit-feature-spec returns in Step 3, the dispatcher MUST commit any modifications to docs/spec/spec.md BEFORE proceeding to Step 5.' This obligation belongs in rabbit-feature's spec because it constrains rabbit-feature-touch's orchestration behavior, not tdd-subagent's prompt-assembler. tdd-subagent v3.0.0 now declares a Pre-Conditions section that points to the caller's spec; rabbit-feature should add an invariant codifying the commit obligation, including the commit-message pattern 'spec(<feature>): update spec for <one-line request summary>' and the no-change skip condition. Wave 4 (rabbit-feature consolidation re-audit) is the natural place to land this.
